meta.title: Shining 3D Intraoral Scanner | Vincor Diagnostics
meta.description: The Shining 3D Aoralscan 3 intraoral scanner: digital dental impressions in color and high resolution. More accurate, faster and more comfortable than traditional impressions.

hero.title: Shining 3D Intraoral Scanner
hero.description: Digital precision for your treatment. The Aoralscan 3 creates dental impressions in full color and high resolution — faster, more accurate and much more comfortable than traditional methods.

technology.title: Aoralscan 3: the next generation
paragraphs: The Shining 3D Aoralscan 3 is one of the most advanced intraoral scanners on the market. With structured light and AI-driven image processing, the scanner creates a fully digital 3D model of your teeth in just a few minutes — in lifelike colors and with an accuracy up to 7 microns.

At Vincor, we use the Aoralscan for manufacturing all our splint products: relaxation splints, repositioning splints and MRA's for sleep apnea. The digital workflow replaces the traditional putty impression entirely, which is not only more comfortable for you as a patient, but also results in a more accurate final product.

benefits.title: Why digital scanning?
benefits.description: The transition from traditional dental impressions to digital scanning offers benefits for both patient and practitioner.

items.title: No more putty
items.description: No unpleasant impression paste in your mouth. The scanner is small, lightweight and contactless. Ideal for patients with a gag reflex.

items.title: Higher accuracy
items.description: Digital scans are demonstrably more accurate than traditional impressions. This results in splints that fit better and work more effectively.

items.title: Immediate results
items.description: You see the 3D model directly on the screen. Together we examine your teeth and discuss treatment options.

items.title: Faster process
items.description: The digital workflow shortens the timeline from scan to finished product. No shipping of physical impressions — everything goes digitally to the laboratory.

howItWorks.title: How does the intraoral scan work?
howItWorks.description: A scan with the Aoralscan 3 is fast, painless and fully digital.

steps.title: Preparation
steps.description: The scanner is activated and your mouth is briefly dried. No further preparation needed.

steps.title: Scanning
steps.description: The compact scan wand is moved along your teeth. In 2-3 minutes, the complete upper and lower teeth are captured in 3D color.

steps.title: Bite registration
steps.description: A short additional scan records how your upper and lower jaw bite together. This is essential for the design of your splint.

steps.title: Design & production
steps.description: The digital model is sent to the laboratory where your splint is custom-made using CAD/CAM technology.

metismile.title: Cloud-based treatment planning
paragraphs: The Aoralscan 3 is connected to the MetiSmile cloud platform — a digital ecosystem for treatment planning and communication with the dental laboratory.

Via MetiSmile, we can analyze your digital dental model, evaluate the splint design and communicate directly with the production team. This speeds up the process and increases the quality of the final result.
features: Cloud-based storage and analysis of scan data
Direct digital communication with the laboratory
Secure data storage compliant with GDPR

cta.title: Experience digital scanning
cta.description: Make an appointment and experience for yourself how comfortable and fast a digital dental impression is.
